abbott-greg.text: Greg Abbott is a candidate for Governor of Texas, running with Republican Party of Texas.
Greg Abbott is the incumbent in this race. Recorded background: Greg Abbott, incumbent governor (2015–present).
No public data in our set on Greg Abbott's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

hinojosa-gina.text: Gina Hinojosa is a candidate for Governor of Texas, running with Texas Democratic Party.
Gina Hinojosa's recorded background: Gina Hinojosa, state representative from the 49th district (2017–present).
No public data in our set on Gina Hinojosa's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

dixon-pat.text: Pat Dixon is a candidate for Governor of Texas, running with Libertarian.
Pat Dixon's recorded background: Pat Dixon (Libertarian), former chair of the Libertarian Party of Texas
No public data in our set on Pat Dixon's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

raphoon-jenn.text: Jenn Mack Raphoon is a candidate for Governor of Texas, running with Independent.
Jenn Mack Raphoon's recorded background: Jenn Mack Raphoon (Independent)
No public data in our set on Jenn Mack Raphoon's campaign finance totals (this office is not required to file with the FEC, or no filing was found).

base.summary: Governor of Texas race: Greg Abbott, Gina Hinojosa, Pat Dixon, Jenn Mack Raphoon. This overview lists each candidate's party, background, and campaign finance where available in our data set.
base.caveats: Our data set for this race covers candidate name, party, incumbency, background summary, and (for federal candidates only) FEC campaign finance totals. We do not have recorded voting histories or issue-by-issue policy positions for these candidates in this data set; state executive offices generally do not file with the FEC, so campaign finance is not available for most of them here.

renter_young_worker.summary: For a renter young worker voter looking at the Governor of Texas race (Greg Abbott, Gina Hinojosa, Pat Dixon, Jenn Mack Raphoon): our data set does not contain candidate-specific positions or voting records on housing costs, rent, or renters' protections for this race. Below is what we do have on each candidate's background and, where available, campaign finance.
renter_young_worker.caveats: We only show a connection to renter young worker concerns when a candidate's own recorded background in our data set names it directly (for example, a farming or small-business background). Where no such record exists, we say so rather than guess at a candidate's likely position.
